mapper.insert: INSERT INTO following (id, from_user_id, to_user_id, rel_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{relStatus}, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.update: UPDATE following SET rel_status = 0, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND rel_status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follower (id, to_user_id, from_user_id, rel_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{toUserId}, #{fromUserId}, #{relStatus}, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.update: UPDATE follower SET rel_status = 0, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND rel_status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM following WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND rel_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM following WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND rel_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM follower WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND rel_status = 1
